_comment: Schiltron demo (#488): the cavalry-specialist hollow-square variant, distinct from orbis. A lone player Infantry unit (facing down) is charged in the REAR by two cavalry that spawn behind it (above; team 1 advances downward onto it). Early on the player selects the infantry and presses Shift+O to jump straight to Schiltron (every plain letter key was already claimed, so schiltron shares orbis's O key with a Shift chord). Like orbis, the ring presents spears/shields on every side so the rear charge finds no weak facing -- but schiltron's denser hedge braces the charge harder than orbis does, at a deeper offence cost. Camera frames the clash. Deterministic (scenario + seed + scripted input).
